anchor_matched: Two or more senses are meaningfully engaged through deliberate material and arrangement choices
scorer_notes: Transcript is uninformative (repeated 'Oh, oh, oh' utterances), but visual observations clearly document a water play setup with multiple sensory modalities: tactile (water, scoops, toys), visual (colorful toys, underwater-themed decor), and proprioceptive (stairs, kneeling, movement). The setup notes also confirm deliberate design intent around water-based exploratory play.
